zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Mercy Hill於1668年12月14日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克比德福德時，她的父親Roger Hill33歲，母親Mary Cross28歲。她於1694年11月15日與David Littlefield在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克威爾斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1746年12月6日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克威爾斯享年77歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼威爾斯利特利費爾德 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Mercy Hill于1668年12月14日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克比德福德时，她的父亲Roger Hill33岁，母亲Mary Cross28岁。她于1694年11月15日与David Littlefield在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克威爾斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1746年12月6日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克威爾斯享年77岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼威爾斯利特利費爾德 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Hill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a hill, from Middle English hill, hell, hull ‘hill’ (Old English hyll). Compare Hiller . This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: possibly in some cases from the personal name Hille, a pet form of some name such as Hilger or Hillary .
German: from a short form of Hildebrand or any of a variety of other names, male and female, containing ancient Germanic hild ‘battle’ as the first element.

variants.name: Hillock
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) small hill’, from Middle English hillok, a diminutive of hille (Old English hyll ‘hill’). See Hill .

variants.name: Hills
meanings: English: variant of Hill with genitival -s if a relationship name, attested in Matilda Hilles, 1327 (Somerset), where the genitival form may signify widowhood; or with plural -s if habitational, attested in Johanne de Hyles, 1379 (Bickerstaffe, Lancashire), and Ricardo del Hyles, 1379 (Great Eccleston, Lancashire); or, with post-medieval excrescent -s, probably the most common form.

variants.name: Hiller
meanings: German: metronymic from Hille, a pet form of the female personal name Hildegund (see Hilke ).
German: from a masculine personal beginning with the ancient Germanic element hild ‘strife, battle’.

variants.name: Hil
meanings: Dutch (Van den Hil): topographic name from hil, hul ‘hill’, particularly in the sense of a flight hill above sea level in the southwestern Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

nameMeanings.name: Mercy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting the quality of magnanimity, and in particular God's forgiveness of sinners, a quality much prized in Christian tradition. The word is derived from Latin merces, which originally meant ‘wage’ or ‘reward’ ( see Mercedes ). The name was in regular use from the mid 15th century onwards and was favoured by the Puritans; Mercy is the companion of Christiana in the second part of John Bunyan's Pilgrim's Progress ( 1684 ). Subsequently, it fell out of use as a given name. In modern use, this is often an Anglicized form of Mercedes.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Mercy Hill was born on 14 December 1668, in Biddeford, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Roger Hill, was 33 and her mother, Mary Cross, was 28. She married David Littlefield on 15 November 1694, in Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 6 December 1746, in Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 77, and was buried in Littlefield Cemetery, Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Mercy Hill est née le 14 décembre 1668, à Biddeford, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Roger Hill, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Mary Cross, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé David Littlefield le 15 novembre 1694, à Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 décembre 1746, à Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Littlefield Cemetery, Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Mercy Hill am 14. Dezember 1668 in Biddeford, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger Hill 33 und ihre Mutter Mary Cross 28. Sie hat am 15. November 1694 in Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America David Littlefield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. Dezember 1746 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Littlefield Cemetery, Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Mercy Hill è nata il il 14 dicembre 1668 nel Biddeford, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Roger Hill, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Mary Cross, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato David Littlefield il 15 novembre 1694, nel Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 6 dicembre 1746, nel Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolta a Littlefield Cemetery, Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Mercy Hillが1668年12月14日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークビッドエフォードで生まれた時，父Roger Hillは33歳，母Mary Crossは28歳であった。1694年11月15日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークウエルズでDavid Littlefieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1746年12月6日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークウエルズで77歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーウエルズリットレフィールド セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Wells, York, Province of Maine, Massachu: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 웰스
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Mercy Hill(이)가 1668년 12월 14일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 비데퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Hill(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Cross(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1694년 11월 15일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 웰스에서 David Littlefield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1746년 12월 6일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 웰스에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 웰스 리틀레필드 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Mercy Hill nasceu em 14 de dezembro de 1668, em Biddeford, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Roger Hill, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Mary Cross, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com David Littlefield em 15 de novembro de 1694, em Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 6 de dezembro de 1746, em Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 77 anos, e foi sepultada em Littlefield Cemetery, Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Mercy Hill родилась 14 декабря 1668 г. в местности биддефорд, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Roger Hill было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Cross, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени David Littlefield 15 ноября 1694 г. в местности веллс, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 6 декабря 1746 г. в местности веллс, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности литлефиелд кеметири, веллс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Mercy Hill nació el 14 de diciembre de 1668, en Biddeford, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Roger Hill, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Mary Cross, tenía 28 años. Se casó con David Littlefield el 15 de noviembre de 1694, en Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 6 de diciembre de 1746, en Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultada en Littlefield Cemetery, Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
